description: CompositionBlack leggings made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, with a soft elastic waistbandFittingRegularWash careWash separately as colour may bleedDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis aurelia legging is crafted from a cotton-spandex bledn fabric, designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect Fit. Team it with long or short kurtas and ballerina flats or heeled sandals or slippers, dangle a pair of chunky earrings and you're all set to seize the day with a fab look.Model statisticsThe model wears chudidars of length 39"Height: 5'7”; Waist: 25”; Hips: 35”
